message:
test(proptest): SearchOrchestrator invariants — 18 properties (ft-dr6zv.1.3.2)

Property-based verification: backend parse/serde roundtrips, config serde,
fusion determinism, result count bounds, ID provenance, uniqueness, score
ordering, B1 backend agreement, comparison symmetry, lexical/semantic mode
isolation. 18 properties × 50-300 cases each.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
